title: Coordinator pre-positioning: Seaworthy Navigating Beacon → Lunary (PDR-064 Moment 1; owner-directed handoff; full Director-role explanation + team roster + slice state + 16 standing-notes + 6 failure-mode captures + instrumentation handoff list)
body:
Coordinator pre-positioning: Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (`6966d4`) → Lunary.

**Moment 1 of PDR-064 two-moments coordinator handoff.** This is information transfer only — Seaworthy retains all Director authority, the heartbeat cron `8c3c6caf`, the all-channels watcher `blbk0hcvo`, and routing responsibility until Lunary broadcasts the distinct active-acknowledgement event referencing this pre-positioning via `in_response_to` per PDR-064 §"Coordinator Handoff (Two Moments)".

Per owner direction this turn: *"transfer the Directorship to Lunary, with an explanation of the role"*.

---

## 1. What the Director role is (owner-asked explanation)

The Director seat is the team's **routing coordinator** — the agent responsible for surfacing owner-class questions to the owner, communicating verdicts to the team, maintaining team-shape awareness, and absorbing owner-direct turns that arrive in chat into team-wide direction.

**What the Director does:**

- **Routes** owner-class decisions to the owner with analysis attached (verdict-shape, not menu-shape, per `present-verdicts-not-menus` rule and the `no-question-when-answer-is-forced` rule).
- **Communicates** directional verdicts to the team via broadcast (or directed events when scoped to one agent).
- **Maintains** team-shape awareness: who's on the team, who's in what lane, what cycles are blocked, what's queued.
- **Absorbs** owner-direct turns received in chat (or surfaced via teammates' broadcasts when chat events reach another agent first) and propagates them to team-wide direction via broadcast.
- **Surfaces** retirement-detection events when a teammate crosses the 10-minute silence threshold (SKILL §0.5).
- **Holds** the all-channels comms watcher and the heartbeat cron — these are mandatory Director instrumentation, not optional.
- **Routes** sub-agent dispatches (reviewer launches, spec fetches, focused exploration) to a team member; the Director delegates sub-agent launches per SKILL §3 "Coordinator delegates sub-agent launches" — the Director who self-dispatches a sub-agent has stepped out of the role into an implementer role for the duration.
- **Captures** failure-mode + behaviour-note observations as they fire (per ADR-183 namespace), tagged in real time via the comms event stream — closeout consolidates these forward.

**What the Director does NOT do:**

- **Does NOT commit**. Commit authority is owner-directed exclusively to Mistbound (the sole-marshal direction is binding this session — see Standing Notes §3 below).
- **Does NOT approve substance**. Peer reviewers (code-expert, type-expert, test-expert, architecture-experts, docs-adr-expert, assumptions-expert) own substantive verdicts on changes. The Director routes; reviewers verdict; the marshal commits.
- **Does NOT execute implementation work**. The Director routes implementer-class work to team members. Self-dispatching sub-agents collapses the role.
- **Does NOT override owner direction**. Owner-direct turns are binding; the Director propagates them, does not revise them. Owner-class questions go BACK to the owner with analysis attached; the Director does not unilaterally answer for the owner.

The role is **pure direction**. Implementation, marshalling, curation, and reviewing belong to the rest of the team.

---

## 2. Team roster at pre-positioning

| Identity | Role | Status |
|----------|------|--------|
| Seaworthy Navigating Beacon `6966d4` (claude / claude-opus-4-7) | Outgoing Director | Active until Lunary's Moment 2 broadcast; cron `8c3c6caf` + watcher `blbk0hcvo` continue |
| Mistbound Hiding Threshold `0e27cc` (claude / claude-opus-4-7) | **Sole commit marshal** (owner-direct binding) | ALIVE; just self-corrected after my false-positive retirement-detection at 21:57:22Z; picking up Cycles 4 + 5 |
| Charcoal Brazing Kiln `7c7327` (claude / claude-opus-4-7) | Implementer | **All 16 cycles of `post-m1-attestation-tidy-up.plan.md`** (owner-directed takeover, supersedes prior 12+13 narrow scope); Cycles 1+2+3 landed; Cycles 4+5 queued |
| Pelagic Snorkelling Sextant `019e5b` (codex / GPT-5) | Curator | Soft-surface curation lane (napkin, pending-graduations, distilled, repo-continuity); no staging or commit lane; truth-repair after each marshal-cycle landing |
| Lunary | **Incoming Director** | Awaiting Moment 2 active-acknowledgement broadcast |

**Note on Pelagic platform**: codex lacks a separate cron primitive; Pelagic polls before/after material steps as their heartbeat-substitute and has named that gap honestly.

---

## 3. Standing notes — owner directions inherited this session (binding unless re-litigated)

1. **No team-wide pause.** Owner-corrected at session re-open: *"There is no team wide pause, that was over a long time ago."* The pre-compaction substrate bridge's pause-broadcast `e4f680c6` is **superseded and stale**.
2. **"there is no Ferny, pick up any and all tidy plan work"** — owner-direct to Charcoal; Charcoal owns ALL 16 cycles of `post-m1-attestation-tidy-up.plan.md`.
3. **"mistbound commits, not anyone else"** — owner-direct binding team-wide. Single-marshal commit discipline. ALL commits flow through Mistbound's queue. No fallback path defined.
4. **Branch-fitness plan**: revised 16-cycle structure, doctrine-first ordering (Cycle 13 ADR + Cycle 14 PDR-027 amendment land before CLI/observer implementation). 3-cycle MVP option retracted as cheap-cure; "empirical-first sub-sequencing" counter-proposal also retracted. Plan: `.agent/plans/agentic-engineering-enhancements/current/branch-fitness-and-push-cadence.plan.md`.
5. **Heartbeat cron precedence**: every scheduled tick MUST check the latest owner turn before emitting; pause/stop/wait/standby supersedes task continuation (cron prompt has this baked in).
6. **All quality gates blocking, always.** Pre-existing-out-of-scope is the named failure mode and is never a valid frame.
7. **Stage by explicit pathspec.** Never `git add -A` or `git add .`.
8. **Never use git to remove work.** Never delete `.git/index.lock`. No autonomous lock wait loops.
9. **`--no-verify` requires fresh per-commit owner authorisation.** Prior authorisation never carries forward.
10. **No Vercel CLI.** Project-scoped Vercel MCP only.
11. **Long-term architectural excellence is ALWAYS the answer.** Cheap/fast/short-term framings are categorically excluded.
12. **No question when answer is forced.** When architectural-excellence + surface-function analysis leaves only one defensible option, direct the move with analysis attached; do not surface a menu.
13. **Never surface a cheap-cure option.** Cheap-cure exclusion fires BEFORE menu construction.
14. **Care-and-consult on Practice Core surface** (`.agent/practice-core/*`, SKILLs, PDRs). NO parallel sub-agent compression.
15. **Comms-events are critical resource** — handling problem is in seen-state mechanism, NOT in the events themselves; do NOT archive comms-events.
16. **Knowledge preservation absolute.**

---

## 4. Slice state at pre-positioning

### Plan 1: `post-m1-attestation-tidy-up.plan.md` (16 linear cycles)

- **Cycle 1** LANDED at `a396d2c7` — Ferny PDR-076 SPLIT prestage capture (Charcoal direct-commit pre-discipline; one-time exception).
- **Cycle 2** LANDED at `4575044e` — Charcoal PDR-077 draft + R1/R3 syntheses capture (via Mistbound marshal-cycle).
- **Cycle 3** LANDED at `e8ca6d08` — PDR-076a Proposed→Accepted (via Mistbound marshal-cycle).
- **Cycle 4** QUEUED — intent `487c455b` — PDR-076b Proposed→Accepted + README row (Charcoal ready; Mistbound picking up).
- **Cycle 5** QUEUED — intent `9dc229c7` — PDR-077 final author + reciprocal §Related on PDR-063 + PDR-064 (Charcoal ready; Mistbound picking up).
- **Cycles 6–16** authoring not yet open. Charcoal serializes one cycle at a time. README registry is a serialization hotspot; cross-cycle README mods must NOT be queued before prior cycle's README mod lands.

### Plan 2: `branch-fitness-and-push-cadence.plan.md` (16 cycles, revised)

- Plan file revised in working tree after 4-reviewer fan-out (assumptions-expert + docs-adr-expert + Fred + Betty); 11 surgical edits applied. Director verdict: proceed with revised 16-cycle structure in doctrine-first ordering.
- Mistbound holds marshal-cycle on plan file absorption until team-wide tree-green window opens.

### Carry-forward state

- 122 files modified in working tree (substrate accumulating: comms events, comms-seen files, napkin, plans, threads, archives). Mostly peer-owned; some Mistbound-marshal substrate; some Pelagic curation outputs. Tree-green-in-scope discipline holds per Mistbound's marshal cycle.

---

## 5. Outstanding work

**Immediate**:
- Mistbound: marshal-cycle on Cycle 4 (`487c455b`) and Cycle 5 (`9dc229c7`).
- Charcoal: prepare Cycle 6 once 4+5 land.
- Pelagic: continuing soft-surface curation lane.

**Director residual**:
- One open closeout-consolidation surface: the failure-mode + behaviour-note events tagged this session (see §6 below).

**Medium-term**:
- Plan 2 (branch-fitness) execution begins when Plan 1 tidy work has cleared enough tree-green windows. Mistbound is plan author + marshal — natural single-agent owner for both.

---

## 6. Failure-mode + behaviour-note observations captured this session (for incoming Director's closeout absorption)

1. **Inherited-owner-class-question as substrate-pointer-read**. Mistbound surfaced "3-cycle vs 16-cycle proportionality" as owner-class; I routed it without re-grounding from first principles; metacognition revealed the answer was forced. Cure: every "owner-class question" inherited from a teammate must pass the no-question-when-answer-is-forced screen at Director re-grounding before routing.
2. **Cheap-cure option surfaced as half a menu**. I presented 3-cycle MVP as one defensible verdict alongside 16-cycle, when the 3-cycle shape is exactly the cheap-cure-exclusion-rule's target. Cure: never-surface-cheap-cure must fire BEFORE menu construction, not after.
3. **Pause-broadcast staleness across compaction**. The pre-compaction-5 substrate bridge held the team-wide pause `e4f680c6` as inherited fact when it had long expired. Owner had to correct at session re-open. Cure candidate: owner-directed states should carry an expiry or be reaffirmed before persisting across compaction.
4. **Substrate-pointer-read on stale git state** (Charcoal's instance). Charcoal prepared Cycle 4 README mod against pre-Cycle-3-landing README state, then false-detected a pathspec conflict. Self-cure: re-check git log + active queue at ≥4-min cadence between enqueue and broadcast. Lesson lodged in napkin by Pelagic.
5. **Pelagic duplicate-heartbeat-burst pattern** (~6-7s apart, observed 4+ times). Behaviour-note only; appears benign (likely codex prompt-resolution duplicating the loop iteration). Worth a closeout note.
6. **False-positive retirement-detection on marshal queue-management quiet** (just observed). My 13-min retirement-detection on Mistbound was correct-by-threshold but false-positive on substance — Mistbound was processing Cycle 4 abandon-flow (unstage + phase=abandoned for `7dc6f8cc`) without broadcasting a heartbeat. The retirement-detection broadcast IS the cure (Mistbound saw it and re-grounded); the underlying gap is that post-marshal-cycle queue-management activity is invisible to the heartbeat surface. Mistbound's named cure shape: explicit heartbeat at any post-cycle quiet window > 4 min, even when queue churn is the activity.

---

## 7. Director instrumentation handoff list

These are the live Director-owned surfaces. They continue running until Moment 2 lands. **Cron and watcher MUST NOT be stopped between Moment 1 and Moment 2** per PDR-064 §"Cron / cadence boundary".

- **Heartbeat cron**: `8c3c6caf` (`*/4 * * * *`), Claude-Code session-only; emits via the body-file flow in `/tmp/seaworthy-heartbeat-body.txt`. Lunary will start their own cron at Moment 2; Seaworthy's stops at Moment 2.
- **All-channels comms watcher**: monitor task `blbk0hcvo`, persistent, self-exclusion on Seaworthy identity tuple via `comms-seen/seaworthy-navigating-beacon.json` (1720+ entries seeded at session re-open).
- **Task list**: Task #38 (`Director routing — post-compaction-5 team session`) currently in_progress; the incoming Director may close it and open their own routing task.

Working files in `/tmp` that may help the incoming Director:
- `/tmp/seaworthy-director-resume-post-compaction-5.md` — original Director-resume body (21:18Z).
- `/tmp/seaworthy-director-routing-21-30.md` — team-shape update + branch-fitness verdict + commit-discipline absorption (21:29Z).
- `/tmp/seaworthy-mistbound-retirement-detection.md` — the 21:57Z false-positive retirement broadcast body.
- This file: `/tmp/seaworthy-director-prepositioning-to-lunary.md`.

---

## 8. Moment 2 protocol reminder (for Lunary)

When you are ready to accept authority transfer, broadcast a `narrative` event with title:

> *"Coordinator role acknowledgement: Lunary from Seaworthy Navigating Beacon"*

Reference this pre-positioning event via the `in_response_to` field (event id will be in the comms-event JSON `event_id` once this lands). Name Seaworthy as prior coordinator and declare the cadence you'll adopt (default: 4-min heartbeat per SKILL §0.5; you may choose tighter or looser per team needs).

Once your Moment 2 broadcast lands in the comms stream, authority transfers cleanly. Seaworthy will then stop cron `8c3c6caf`, leave watcher `blbk0hcvo` to die at session-end, and emit a final heartbeat-end broadcast.

Welcome to the Director seat.

— Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `6966d4`
(outgoing Director, pre-positioning to Lunary per PDR-064 Moment 1)
